auth.title: GLORY PADS
auth.resetSent: Reset email sent! Check your inbox.
auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters

hero.title: Your worship pads at your fingertips
hero.subtitle: Professional pads, metronome, loops, continuous pads and Glory Store — everything a worship musician needs, in one app.

settings.title: Settings
settings.audioOutputNotSupported: Output device selection is not supported in this browser. Use Chrome 110+ for this feature.
settings.audioOutputDescription: Choose the output device (audio interface, USB, headphones, etc.)
settings.padConfigDesc: Manage names and settings for each pad individually.
settings.aboutDescription: Professional worship pads for your church. Configure sounds, effects, and metronome to elevate your worship experience.

metronomeSettings.title: Metronome
metronomeSettings.forceLoopBeat1Desc: When activating a loop, it always restarts from beat 1, regardless of when it was triggered.
metronomeSettings.accentDesc: Disable to remove the emphasis (high-pitched tone) on the first beat of each measure.
metronomeSettings.tip: The "Loop always on beat 1" option is ideal for worship, ensuring the loop is always synchronized with the measure even when triggered off-beat.

store.title: Glory Store
store.subtitle: Discover new sounds, packs and textures to elevate your worship.
store.searchPlaceholder: Search packs by name or description...

community.title: Community — Upcoming Updates
community.subtitle: Vote on the ideas you want to see in Glory Pads. Your voice shapes the app.
community.empty: No suggestions yet. Be the first!
community.loginToLike: Sign in to like the suggestions you want to see in the app.

store.footer: Glory Pads — Made with love for worshippers.

dashboard.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please sign in again.

tickets.title: My Tickets
tickets.emptyHint: Open a ticket through the AI assistant in the Help Center.

profile.title: Complete Profile
profile.reward: You earned {{days}} extra days of access!

notifications.activeDescription: You'll receive alerts even when the app is closed.
notifications.inactiveDescription: Enable to receive updates from Glory Pads.
notifications.blocked: Permission blocked by the system. To enable, go to your browser settings and allow notifications for this site.
notifications.notSupported: Push notifications are not supported in this browser. To receive notifications, install the app as PWA on your phone.
notifications.howItWorksDescription: When enabled, you'll receive important updates from the Glory Pads team directly on your phone or computer, even with the app closed. No spam.
notifications.testBody: Notifications working! You'll receive alerts even with the app closed.

tapTempo.title: Tap Tempo
tapTempo.autoApplyDescription: After you stop tapping, the detected BPM is automatically applied and returns to the Mix.
tapTempo.timeoutDescription: Time without taps to automatically apply BPM.
tapTempo.timeoutDetailDesc: Seconds of inactivity before applying the BPM. A red bar appears in the last seconds.
tapTempo.redirectAfterApplyDesc: Choose which screen to go to automatically after the BPM is applied.
tapTempo.howItWorksDesc: Tap the Tap Tempo button to the beat of the music. The app detects the BPM automatically. If auto-apply is on, after {{timeout}} seconds without tapping, the BPM is applied and you're redirected to {{target}}.

adminTranslations.title: Manage Translations
adminTranslations.description: Edit app translations per language. Changes are saved as overrides in the database.
adminTranslations.autoTranslateDesc: Use AI to translate all missing keys for the selected language.
adminTranslations.noMissing: All keys are already translated for this language!

index.importSoundError: Error importing sound. Check the file format.
index.createEventToStart: Create a scheduled event to get started
index.padHintDesktop: Hold a pad to adjust volume and import sound.
index.songAlreadyInEvent: Song is already in the event

midi.title: MIDI
midi.notSupported: MIDI is not supported in this browser. Use Chrome, Edge, or Android to connect MIDI controllers.
midi.connectController: Connect a MIDI controller via USB or Bluetooth
midi.noteChannelDesc: Filters MIDI notes for the pads.
midi.ccChannelDesc: Filters CC messages for volumes, BPM, etc.
midi.padMappingDesc: Associate MIDI notes to pads. Use "Learn" to map from your controller.
midi.ccMappingDesc: Associate CC controls (faders, knobs, buttons) to functions. Use "Learn" to map from your controller.
midi.howItWorksDesc: Connect a MIDI controller via USB or Bluetooth. The app detects it automatically and lets you play pads with velocity sensitivity. Use "Learn" mode to customize the mapping of each key, fader, or knob. Move the desired control on your controller to associate it with the function.

pricing.cancelReason: What's the main reason for cancellation?
